```{python}
#| include: false
import yaml

# Load resume data
with open('/Users/shakes/DevProjects/jobsearch/templates/resume/data/resume-data.yml', 'r') as f:
    resume_data = yaml.safe_load(f)

personal = resume_data['personal']
experience = resume_data['experience']
education = resume_data['education']
skills = resume_data['skills']
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

# Generate raw Typst content
typst_content = f"""#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)
#set page(margin: (top: 1.5cm, bottom: 1.5cm, left: 1.5cm, right: 1.5cm))

#align(center)[
  #text(size: 20pt, weight: "bold")[{personal['firstname']} {personal['lastname']}]
  
  #text(size: 14pt)[{personal['positions'][0]}]
  
  #v(0.5em)
  
  #text(size: 10pt)[
    {personal['email']} | {personal['phone']} | {personal['address']}
    
    LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/{personal['linkedin']} | GitHub: github.com/{personal['github']}
  ]
]

#line(length: 100%, stroke: 1pt)

#v(1em)

{resume_data['summary']['default']}

#v(1em)

= Experience
"""

# Add experience entries
for exp in experience:
    typst_content += f"""
*{exp['title']}* | {exp['company']} | {exp['location']} | {exp['date']}

"""
    
    for bullet in exp['bullets']:
        # Clean up bullet text for Typst - escape dollars
        text = bullet['text'].replace('$', '\\$')
        # Handle bold text markers properly
        if '**' in text:
            parts = text.split('**')
            if len(parts) >= 3:
                # Bold formatting: **text** becomes *text*
                text = parts[0] + '*' + parts[1] + '*' + '**'.join(parts[2:])
        
        typst_content += f"- {text}\n"
    
    typst_content += "\n"

typst_content += """
= Education
"""

# Add education entries
for edu in education:
    typst_content += f"""
*{edu['degree']}* | {edu['school']} | {edu['location']} | {edu['date']}
"""
    
    if 'notes' in edu:
        notes_str = " | ".join(edu['notes'])
        typst_content += f"- {notes_str}\n"
    
    typst_content += "\n"

typst_content += """
= Skills
"""

# Add skills entries
for category, skill_list in skills.items():
    category_name = category.replace('_', ' ').title()
    skills_str = ', '.join(skill_list)
    typst_content += f"*{category_name}:* {skills_str}\n\n"

print(typst_content)
```
